title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions!
